text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru wants to stop by<n>somewhere
before going home one<n>day, so I go with her...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Without further ado, let's bungee<n>jump!
choice_data_list: I think there is much ado needed here!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Well, let me explain first! In today's<n>pair fortune, it
said that bungee<n>jumping together would bring us
good luck!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: And that's not all! Look at the slogan!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Push yourself to the extremes! A<n>bungee
experience so divine that<n>you'll pierce the
heavens! In other<n>words, this will take us to the
realm of<n>the gods!

text_block_list.name: Customer
text_block_list.text:
Urk... that jump was insane. I felt my<n>soul leave
my body...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Eek?! Their soul left their body?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
W-we can't! My divinations are a<n>covenant
between me and Shiraoki! I<n>need to see this
through, no matter<n>what!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
And I've prepared an extra special<n>lucky charm
for the occasion!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I call it... the "survive with one HP"<n>charm!
Whatever comes my way, I<n>should be able to just
barely endure<n>it! Protection guaranteed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
This is usually reserved for video<n>games, but I
thought it'd be perfect<n>for regular life-or-death
situations too.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
As long as I have this, my soul should<n>remain
firmly inside my body, a<n>hundred percent! Hm,
make that<n>seventy. Maybe less. Anyway, I'm
sure I'll be fine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
C-come on! Let's give it a go and<n>prove what a
powerful pair we are!
choice_data_list: Okay, let's give it our best shot!
Let me go instead, for the both of us.
Let me go instead, for the both of us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
C-come on! Let's give it a go and<n>prove what a
powerful pair we are!
choice_data_list: Okay, let's give it our best shot!
Let me go instead, for the both of us.
Let me go instead, for the both of us.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's the spirit! This'll be a breeze!<n>A breezy
jump, that is!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We stand in line, waiting for our<n>numbers to be
called. At long last...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eek, why are we this high?! At this<n>rate, we won't
pierce the<n>heavens—the gods will just open the
door for us!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Y-yeah! I must steel my spirit... Glory<n>be to the
spinach leaf! Glory be to the<n>spinach leaf!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gyaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oof... I felt like I was going to spew<n>something, and
it wasn't going to be<n>words of wisdom, that's for
sure...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Urk... Thank you... for... coming withme...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Without you here, I think I would have<n>let my soul
leave my body out of<n>despair...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Perhaps this experience was the<n>hidden meaning
to my divination. An<n>opportunity to form a strong
bond<n>with you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now then! I understand this may be<n>sudden, but
the time has come for us<n>to put that bond to the
test!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm clinging to life with just one HP to<n>my name,
so prove our bond by<n>looking after me!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Give me a piggyback ride! Oh, or we<n>could just
taxi it up. I really don't<n>mind either way!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
If it's our bond we're putting to the<n>test,
shouldn't we overcome this trial<n>together? We
end up walking home<n>on foot instead.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! S-say it isn't so... You're<n>proving our
friendship by putting<n>yourself on the line?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
That's unacceptable! Sacrificing<n>yourself like that
is not the way to go!
choice_data_list: I couldn't bear to sacrifice you.
I couldn't bear to sacrifice you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: You're willing to go that far for me?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Our hearts truly beat as one... The<n>great Shiraoki is
sure to understand<n>our decision!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I will be with you in spirit, but<n>it won't hurt
to take this lucky charm<n>with you as well.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I made it by hand, so it's guaranteed<n>to bring good
fortune!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I line up to do the bungee jump on
Matikanefukukitaru's behalf.

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: Okay, get ready! Time to take the<n>bungee plunge!
...ease... eep... out... her...
Please, keep looking out for her.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Thank the gods! You're back! Are<n>you okay?
Soul's still in there, right?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
For a brief moment, I felt like I was in<n>a strange
place and heard a voice<n>speaking to me... but it
looks like I<n>managed to get through the bungee
jump just fine.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Phew, that's good to hear. I was<n>worried sick
waiting for you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh yeah! Living off of one HP must be<n>rough, but I
bought a load of stuff<n>while I was waiting!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I got you some nutrient-rich carrot<n>juice and a
taiyaki that's steaming<n>real auspiciously...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I also had a go on the claw mach—I<n>mean, I tested
my luck and was<n>blessed with this friendship
bracelet!<n>Try it on!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I've looked up the bus times for us,<n>so just relax
and enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: No, I'm the one who should be<n>thanking you!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Matikanefukukitaru may be<n>unpredictable and a
little wild in her<n>ways, but her care is heartfelt and
genuine.
